value:
• Expenditure on post-natal care varies significantly by source, with government/public hospitals being the least expensive at an average of 2241.79 Rs. (Subtotal), while informal health care providers (4560.08 Rs. Subtotal) and private hospitals (4341.32 Rs. Subtotal) incur the highest average costs.
  • Across all major sources, receiving 'both' types of post-natal care consistently results in higher average expenditure compared to receiving 'Ayush' care alone (e.g., for private hospitals, 'both' care costs 5259.90 Rs. compared to 4028.23 Rs. for 'Ayush' care).
